note: Final 100 unique Pip face-effect ideas, deduped and scored. diff = difference-from-existing (1-10), fun = fun factor (1-10), sum = diff+fun (/20). klass: mood (held status) | gesture (one-shot) | action (loop/sequence) | reaction (NEW: sensor/event-triggered) | widget (NEW: persistent data HUD). Scored by two subagents against the existing ~75 effects.

proposed_new_classes.reaction: sensor/event-triggered one-shots (pet, pickup, shake, tilt, light, silence) — like a gesture but fired by the physical world, not the coding flow
proposed_new_classes.widget: persistent data HUD that shows information, not emotion (clock, notifications, now-playing, CPU, weather) — opt-in, the only non-emotive class

ideas.name: smug
ideas.desc: heavy half-lids + one raised brow + self-satisfied tilt

ideas.name: proud
ideas.desc: bright upturned eyes, chin-up tilt, a tiny held sparkle

ideas.name: curious
ideas.desc: head-tilt sway, one eye larger, pupils drifting up

ideas.name: shy
ideas.desc: small eyes, gaze down-and-away, wavy blush lower lid

ideas.name: flustered
ideas.desc: darting pupils + wavy bottom lids, flushed and rattled

ideas.name: hopeful
ideas.desc: big round eyes gazing up, one held sparkle, please-please

ideas.name: content
ideas.desc: relaxed gentle upcurve lids, quietly satisfied

ideas.name: lonely
ideas.desc: one eye dimmed, slow drift, lots of empty dark space

ideas.name: starstruck
ideas.desc: star-shaped pupils held wide, fan-mode adoration

ideas.name: hypnotized
ideas.desc: concentric spiral pupils slowly rotating, entranced

ideas.name: greedy
ideas.desc: dollar-sign ($) pupils held, money-eyed

ideas.name: knockout
ideas.desc: X-shaped eyes held, dazed/KO'd, seeing stars

ideas.name: pixelated
ideas.desc: eyes rendered coarse and blocky, low-res retro

ideas.name: overheated
ideas.desc: drooping melted lids + heat shimmer + a sweat bead

ideas.name: frostbitten

ideas.name: dreamy

ideas.name: smirk

ideas.name: disappointed

ideas.name: unimpressed

ideas.name: queasy

ideas.name: lowpower

ideas.name: cringe

ideas.name: grateful

ideas.name: determined

ideas.name: mischief

ideas.name: owl

ideas.name: hangry

ideas.name: brow_raise

ideas.name: double_take

ideas.name: side_eye

ideas.name: facepalm

ideas.name: gulp

ideas.name: gasp

ideas.name: brow_waggle

ideas.name: boing

ideas.name: brain_freeze

ideas.name: spit_take
ideas.desc: a calm sip, then a shocked spray of surprise

ideas.name: sleeping
ideas.desc: eyes shut, 'Z z z' rising in a loop, deep sleep

ideas.desc: shut eyes + a thought-bubble cycling little scenes

ideas.name: crying

ideas.name: groove

ideas.name: breathe
ideas.desc: gentle slow scale in/out, calm 'alive' idle loop

ideas.name: coffee
ideas.desc: a steaming cup sipped, steam curls, a caffeine break

ideas.name: whistling

ideas.name: party
ideas.desc: confetti/streamers rain with bouncing eyes, celebration loop

ideas.name: matrix

ideas.name: warp

ideas.desc: eyes flank a live digital time readout (or become a clock)
